title: NZ Government Web Usability Standard 1.4
description: Mandatory standard for New Zealand public sector organisations requiring compliance with web usability, identity, contact, copyright, and privacy requirements for publicly and internally facing websites. Effective 17 March 2025, replacing version 1.3.
